title: conyza spathulata
intro: Conyza spathulata, also known as the narrow-leaved fleabane, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Conyza spathulata include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Conyza spathulata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various health issues.
